text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, a decisive battle held among the
shrines and temples of Kyoto, is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite never having raced 3,000 meters before,
Matikanefukukitaru approaches the track with a
positive attitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving everything to fate and the gods, she
takes on the hellishly long race!
